issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing files or merge conflicts.
The skill is vendor-locked to Windsurf and does not support other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Set up workspace .windsurfrules for React/TypeScript SaaS
scenarios.rationale: Treatment created .windsurfrules at the project root with Tech Stack, Code Style, Architecture Rules, Testing sections and an explicit 'What NOT to Do' block as documented; baseline produced a generic style guide without the workspace-rules file path or section structure.

scenarios.name: Distinguish global vs workspace rules and use Memories
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly placed cross-project preferences in Windsurf Settings -> General -> Rules for AI and project-specific patterns in .windsurfrules, plus showed natural-language 'Remember:' Memories trigger; baseline mixed both scopes into a single file.
